page_summary: A page displaying a long list of factorizations of very large integers, accompanied at the bottom by silhouettes of elongated human figures.

symbols.description: Exponentiation notation such as 2^6, 3^2, 7^3 used throughout the factorization lines
Multiplication sign x used between factors

decorations.description: A row of five black silhouette figures of elongated, abstract human forms. The figures appear thin and stylized, reminiscent of Giacometti-style sculptures. They stand vertically and are arranged side by side along the bottom of the page.
decorations.position: bottom of page, spanning roughly the lower third below the numerical text
components: left figure: tall figure with a small round head, raised arm holding an object
second figure: tall thin figure with a small head, slight leg bend
third figure (center): two overlapping very tall thin forms, one taller than the other
fourth figure: tall thin form leaning slightly
right figure: figure with a small head and a defined foot extending to the right

uncertain_or_unreadable: Exact meaning or artwork origin of the silhouettes at the bottom is not certain, though they resemble elongated modernist figurative sculptures.
